commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Give me understanding, and I shall keep your law; yea, I shall observe it with my whole heart. Augustine of Hippo 34. "Give me understanding, and I shall search Thy law, yea, I shall keep it with my whole heart" (ver. For when each man hath searched the law, and searched its deep things, in which its whole meaning doth consist; he ought indeed to love God with all his heart, with all his soul, with all his mind; and his neighbour as himself. "For on these two commandments hang all the Law and the Prophets. " This he seemeth to have promised, when he said, "Yea, I shall keep it with my whole heart.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Heart. Enable me to keep and to understand thy law, ver. 1, 2. (Worthington)
We must observe what we know, that we may receive greater lights. (Haydock)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
